claim_supported: On Sports, Toys, Home, and Tools 10k-user/101-candidate same-candidate domains, C-CRP v3 ranks first against eight official-code-level baselines, with all 56 per-domain C-CRP-vs-official metric tests positive and Holm-significant.
claim_scope: paper-facing full-metric evidence ledger for the four-domain same-candidate official comparison; not a paper-readiness verdict and not full-catalog SOTA
claim_not_supported: uncertainty mechanism proven without Phase 2.5 motivation, ablation, and hyperparameter evidence
universal cross-domain winner beyond tested same-candidate domains
